name: Invivyd, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Invivyd, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of monoclonal antibody (mAb) therapies for the prevention and treatment of serious viral infectious diseases. We are devoted to delivering protection from serious viral infectious diseases, beginning with SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19.
